feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >elden ring 2 trailer finally drops >this time it takes place on the high seas >…
entry.content: >elden ring 2 trailer finally drops >this time it takes place on the high seas >you got a boat and is looking for land >there are 9 islands total in the game >each island is a legacy dungeon that can take up to 5 hours to complete >you find companions along the way and can bring one with you onto an island where is it, kojima?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: Is making AI porn videos of girls still a thing now or has it all been censored …

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Community-powered internet radio.
entry.content: I spent the last year building something because I got tired of algorithms deciding what I should see and hear. It's called SignalRadio.app The idea is simple: One global room. People from anywhere in the world can tune in, chat, submit music, and collectively vote on what the station plays. No influencers. No endless scrolling. No recommendation algorithm. Just a strange little corner of the internet that always has someone awake. Every room has its own atmosphere. I'm building them like places
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: >Who's your favorite composer? >Richard Strauss ("Strauß" means "ostrich" in Ger…
entry.content: >Who's your favorite composer? >Richard Strauss ("Strauß" means "ostrich" in German) Unironically, why did at least one German family name itself after a flightless bird from Africa?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Minigun vs Tomislav
entry.content: I know that the tomislav is the 'correct' choice in most scenarios, but I just can't let go of the stock minigun. Something about it, just feels. . right. Which minigun do you prefer when playing Heavy?

entry.title: /int/ International: Sverigetråden Bukowskiupplagan
entry.content: han står i rutan, ulf, en likkista med slips, och säger försvarsrätt med en mun som aldrig sugit av en hemlös gud. israel, hans krigsbarn av splitter, läcker var ur en bucklig termos medan barnens avslitna hälar bokförs i asfaltens räknekvarn. jag sitter här med min lever som ett spybälte och ser kostymhajar kopulera i en sörja av tarmvred och järn. ingen sång, bara politikens missfallsblod rinner längs hakan på en jävla eftermiddag där till och med hatet fått ruttna liggsår. ge mig en flaska ti
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: Old VN and general PC-98 games
entry.content: These games look gorgeous and nothing will ever be as beautiful as the late 80s - early 00s in terms of graphics, and these games were truly immersive in a way that today's games don't come close to. They're emotionally immersive. The aesthetics alone! One single screenshot has more personality than an entire modern game in 4K. Have you ever fallen in love with a character from VNs or dating sims? What are your favorites? You think they could return?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /o/ Auto: This photo was taken in 2008 in California. Anyone have any idea what's going on…
entry.content: This photo was taken in 2008 in California. Anyone have any idea what's going on with the licence plate on the car? I've checked and the earliest upload date is back in 2008, so it's not some AI bullshit or upscaling.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This movie came out in Japan earlier this week. I just saw it tonight. It was gr…
entry.content: This movie came out in Japan earlier this week. I just saw it tonight. It was great. Wonderful acting. Bear was the villain. Nice balance of suspense, jumpscares, and violence without going too much in any direction. I enjoyed it. It deserves the praise.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Unlike the UEFI Forum that oversees x86 OEMs and mandates all x86 PCs implement …
entry.content: Unlike the UEFI Forum that oversees x86 OEMs and mandates all x86 PCs implement UEFI and allow end users to run any code they want, including bootloaders for any OS they want, ARM allows complete "freedom" for corponigger ARM OEMs to release billions upon billions of completely locked down unserviceable unmaintainable planned obsolescence 5-year-lifespan-maximum ARM devices with zero user freedoms. When's the last time you saw a functioning ARM computer older than 5 years? How about 10 years? x8
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /news/ News: New York sculptor spent $100,000 to make a Charlie Kirk statue no one wants to buy
entry.content: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news /2026/jul/20/sculptor-charlie-kirk- statue-new-york A New York sculptor has been left furious after spending $100,000 of his own money to build a lifesize statue of Charlie Kirk, only to find that no one wants to buy it. Sergio Furnari, originally from Italy, had hoped the statue of the deceased far-right activist, which he intends to display in Times Square, would raise “millions” of dollars. Instead, he said he has been inundated by messages from people sayi
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: built a minimalist text board, tell me what's wrong with it green tint, aero gla…
entry.content: built a minimalist text board, tell me what's wrong with it green tint, aero glass, nature background, no images. built it because i wanted 4chan's format without 4chan's hosting bill or mod nightmare. probably has ten things wrong with it that i'm too close to see. texttotalk.org — go ahead, be brutal
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How important is a graphics card these days? I'm looking to buy a computer that …
entry.content: How important is a graphics card these days? I'm looking to buy a computer that I won't use for gaming. I'll use it for browsing online, some programs, torrenting and streaming videos to my TV. Might play some older games on it. How important is a graphics card in these circumstances? The motherboard I'm getting is ASUS PRIME B760M-A WIFI D4
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: do you give agency to cloud AI agents for your personal computer? if you do, do …
entry.content: do you give agency to cloud AI agents for your personal computer? if you do, do you use only VMs? do you do any kind of defensive action for it? if not, why? theoretically they are bound to the workspace and executing commands only in the workspace but they seem to be able to go to other folders with no problem when you give them permission. they also always ask permission to read files and run commands, but checking every single command is tiresome and I see no guarantee they will always ask pe
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Studio execs should learn the difference between famous and popular. Characters …
entry.content: Studio execs should learn the difference between famous and popular. Characters like Superman, Robin Hood, Peter Pan etc. are famous, but that doesn't make them popular. Everyone knows them but isn't exactly a fan clamoring to go consume them as a media, which is why their films are always a financial letdown when given a big budget, even with giga astroturfing like in Superman's case.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: How to be Safe from False rape accusations
entry.content: Is there a way to be foolproof from being accused of rape? I'm a creepy looking dude some random woman can accuse me of rape and people will believe it. I don't even go near women anymore, I try to avoid them as best I can. Covered all my phone's cameras so I don't get accused of Creepshots. When I have go near a woman, I raise my hands like I'm being arrested. I keep logs of my locations and witnesses. I also make sure I am not alone with a woman in a room.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: i never understood why people felt suicidal until today. didn't sleep all night …
entry.content: i never understood why people felt suicidal until today. didn't sleep all night and now there's a symphony of reverse beeps from the construction work nearby. they never pause for more than 10 seconds before one starts again. is going 30 feet backwards really dangerous enough to warrant a beeper audible from half a block away?

entry.content: >Nursing Handjob Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84213163/ >Scripts to check image metadata: re
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What if the main reason why vibe coded projects are laggy/messy was human rather…
entry.content: What if the main reason why vibe coded projects are laggy/messy was human rather than technological? Like, "Claude, add this shiny new feature" gives off so much more dopamine than "Claude, please audit this codebase for spaghetti code", "Claude, please address these issues" and "Claude, could you audit this code for regressions?" combined.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Magically Charged Albums
entry.content: So I’ve been exploring a bit more recently since getting a nice pair of new headphones. I’m coming to find I thoroughly enjoy music that has a clear occult/esoteric/hermetic influence to it. Rather it be sort of evil (i love sinister sounding things, trap and drill are guilty pleasures of mine) or higher vibrational such as picrel or certain types of classical or jazz. Some other good examples of albums that are clearly steeped in magic are Led Zeppelin IV, Crystal Castles (II), Exmilitary, and
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Post the Bush Likelihood of your TV Waifu
entry.content: Very high likelihood — probably 80-90% in-character for Daphne Moon. Daphne (Jane Leeves) is written as a no-nonsense, earthy, working-class Mancunian from a big, chaotic family in 1990s Britain. She's practical, not vain or high-maintenance, and the show leans into her "natural" vibe — frumpy cardigans, psychic quirks, blunt honesty, and zero pretense.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 70mm is a massive meme
entry.content: saw the odyssey at one of those select special theaters projecting it on 70mm laser bullshit at my girlfriend’s insistence. Not only did it look indistinguishable from any other theater I’ve been to but it actually looked fucking worse because of the violent flashing during every scene involving a bright sky. Thought it was going to give me an electric soldier porygon seizure. Swear to god this is all a massive meme and Nolan and his audience can’t even tell the difference themselves and only pr
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
